summary: Iteration 2 comprehensive testing complete. Backend: 33/33 pytest tests pass covering all new endpoints — tariff (late_fee/due_day), dues with new late-fee fields, maintenance pay mode=current_month (incl. 400 when current month not pending), full pay with late fee & conveyance, receipt PDF (%PDF header verified) + 404 for missing, admin late-fee GET/POST (wrong PIN 401, negative 400, roundtrip), admin/payments with summary (grand_total = maint+bookings), admin/payments/today (all paid_date == today), export & export/today Excel with PIN gate. Frontend E2E on mobile viewport 390×844: SATRWA logo image (assets/images/logo-satrwa.png) loaded (naturalWidth=1376) in home header, register flow works, home dues card shows outstanding ₹28,650 + '14 MONTHS' badge + 'Late fee ₹650' subtitle, maintenance screen shows late-fee-notice warning card, segmented control labels are 'Pay All Pending' (14 months) and 'Current Month' (2026-07) — Current Month tab enabled since current month is pending, summary card shows Maintenance × N/Late Fee × N/Conveyance/Total lines, proceed → UPI payment screen with sticky Confirm button + upi-id-input above keyboard region (KeyboardStickyView + KeyboardAwareScrollView in code), mock UPI pay succeeded → receipt OP019 for ₹2,000 (current_month mode, no late fee since 2026-07-01 ≤ 15th — correct), Receipt screen shows PDF and Share buttons (download-pdf-btn, share-btn). Admin panel: 4 tabs (Today/All/Series/Settings) all present; Today tab shows stats card + Download Today's Excel; Settings tab shows late-fee-input + Save Late Fee. No React Native red screens, no console errors, no deprecated Expo packages detected. All new features working as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~640 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider splitting into routes/services/pdf modules in a future refactor.
PDF generation is synchronous (reportlab) inside async handler — fine for A5 single-page receipts, but if scale grows, run in executor.
Admin export & late-fee POST take pin in body/query — acceptable for small app scope; PIN may appear in server access logs when passed as query param (existing).
compute_dues re-reads late_fee from admin_settings on every call — consider caching, but current perf fine at this scale.
seed_data_creation: During run: Flat C/L<runtag> (start 2025-06, 14 late months, then paid full with conveyance) and Flat B/C<runtag> (start current month, paid current_month then gym+pool bookings). One UI-created flat F/U<timestamp> registered with start_month 2025-06 and one current-month maintenance payment made (receipt OP019). Late fee toggled to 75 and restored to 50 via admin roundtrip test. All test data prefixed for safe cleanup. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 33 backend pytest tests pass in /app/backend/tests/test_satrwa_api.py. Frontend testIDs verified: block-select-{A..F}, flat-no-input, bhk-select-{2BHK|3BHK}, owner-name-input, phone-input, start-month-input, login-btn, register-btn, back-to-login, admin-link, dues-summary-card, maintenance-card, amenity-card, history-link, logout-btn, late-fee-notice, pay-full-tab, pay-current-tab (new — replaces pay-one-tab), conveyance-switch, proceed-pay-btn, upi-id-input, upi-amount, confirm-pay-btn, receipt-card, receipt-number, download-pdf-btn (new), share-btn (new), done-btn, admin-pin-input, admin-verify-btn, today-tab (new), all-tab (new), series-tab, settings-tab (new), download-today-btn (new), download-all-btn (new), late-fee-input (new), save-late-fee-btn (new), refresh-btn, today-panel, all-panel, series-prefix-input, series-start-input, series-end-input, add-series-btn, activate-<id>. Receipt series was on OP019 after this run. Container date at test time was 2026-07-01, so current_month=2026-07 and today.day=1 ≤ 15 → current-month payments were NOT late in UI test (correct backend + UI behavior). If retested after the 15th, current_month_late will become true and Current Month payments will include ₹50 late fee.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All requested iteration-2 features work end-to-end.
